description: The user hovers the cursor over the 'Next' button at the bottom of the 'Custom screener' page.
frame_description: The 'Custom screener' page is visible, showing three multiple-choice and short-answer questions for participant screening.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to the next step of the study setup.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is highlighted as it is clicked.

description: The application navigates from the 'Custom screener' page to the 'Your Timezone' page under the 'Additional Info' section.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the screener questions to a page titled 'Your Timezone' with a dropdown showing 'Australia/Brisbane'.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button on the 'Your Timezone' page.
frame_description: The 'Next' button below the timezone selection is clicked.

description: The application navigates to the 'Description' page.
frame_description: The page content changes to show fields for 'Short description of who you're looking for' and 'Full description of the opportunity'.

description: The user types a question into the short description text field.
interaction_target: Short description of who you're looking for (Required)
frame_description: The text 'Do you watch TV on streaming services?' appears character by character in the input field.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button on the 'Description' page.
frame_description: The 'Next' button at the bottom of the description form is clicked.

description: The application navigates to the 'Additional Instructions' page.
frame_description: The screen transitions to show a page for 'Additional instructions for confirmed participants'.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button on the 'Additional Instructions' page.
frame_description: The 'Next' button below the 'Add additional instructions' button is clicked.

description: The application navigates to the 'Contacts' page.
frame_description: The page content changes to show 'Organiser' and 'Facilitator' contact details.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button on the 'Contacts' page.
frame_description: The 'Next' button below the contact information is clicked.

description: The application navigates to the 'Legal & privacy' page.
frame_description: The page content changes to show options for 'Use Askable's standard Terms and Conditions' or 'Use a custom agreement'.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button on the 'Legal & privacy' page.
frame_description: The 'Next' button below the legal options is clicked.

description: The application navigates to the 'Session Times' page.
frame_description: A calendar view for February 2026 is displayed, allowing the user to select interview slots.

description: The user clicks on the calendar grid to add a session slot for Wednesday, Feb 25th.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the 8:00 AM slot for Wednesday.

description: A session block appears on the calendar for the selected time.
frame_description: A blue box labeled '8:00am - 8:45am' appears on Wednesday.

description: The user clicks on the calendar grid to add another session slot for Wednesday.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the 10:00 AM slot for Wednesday.

description: A second session block appears on the calendar.
frame_description: A blue box labeled '10:00am - 10:45am' appears on Wednesday.

description: The user clicks on the calendar grid to add a session slot for Thursday, Feb 26th.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the 8:00 AM slot for Thursday.

description: A session block appears on Thursday.
frame_description: A blue box labeled '8:00am - 8:45am' appears on Thursday.

description: The user clicks on the calendar grid to add another session slot for Thursday.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the 10:00 AM slot for Thursday.

description: A second session block appears on Thursday.
frame_description: A blue box labeled '10:00am - 10:45am' appears on Thursday.

description: The user clicks on the calendar grid to add a session slot for Friday, Feb 27th.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the 8:00 AM slot for Friday.

description: A session block appears on Friday.
frame_description: A blue box labeled '8:00am - 8:45am' appears on Friday.

description: The user clicks on the calendar grid to add another session slot for Friday.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the 10:00 AM slot for Friday.

description: A second session block appears on Friday.
frame_description: A blue box labeled '10:00am - 10:45am' appears on Friday.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button on the 'Session Times' page.
frame_description: The 'Next' button at the bottom left of the calendar view is clicked.

description: The application navigates to the 'Review & Submit' page.
frame_description: A summary of the study setup is displayed, including a mobile preview of the study listing.

description: The user scrolls down the 'Review & Submit' page to review all the details.
frame_description: The page content moves upwards as the user scrolls to the bottom of the summary.

description: The user clicks the 'Submit study' button.
frame_description: The 'Submit study' button at the bottom of the review page is clicked.

description: The 'Submit study' button changes state to indicate the submission is in progress.
frame_description: The button text changes to 'Submitting...' and the button becomes disabled.

description: The application navigates to the participants management page after successful submission.
frame_description: The screen transitions to a table view for managing study participants.

description: The participants list page finishes loading its initial state.
frame_description: The loading indicators disappear and the empty state for the participants table is shown.
